summary: Completed frontend testing of AGM SALES Salary Calculator new features: Short Hours Deduction (3L), Attendance Search/Edit, and Salary Report columns
passed_tests: Short Hours Deduction section (3L) is visible and functional
Enable Short Hours Deduction toggle works correctly (default: enabled)
Short Hours Conversion Base input works (default: 9)
Attendance Upload page loads with proper upload zone
Search input for employees is present (data-testid: attendance-search-input)
Edit button functionality is implemented in preview table
Salary Report page shows proper no-data state
Employee management works (successfully added test employee)
All required data-testid attributes are present for testing
